3.5.3 Memory-bounded heuristic search

4.1 L OCAL SEARCH ALGORITHMS AND OPTIMIZATION PROBLEMS
The search algorithms that we have seen so far are designed to explore search spaces sys-tematically. This systematicity is achieved by keeping one or more paths in memory and byrecording which alternatives have been explored at each point along the path. The process of looking for a sequence of actions that reaches the goal is called search.
